_comment: Copy this file to prisma/seed.config.json and fill in your details. seed.config.json is gitignored. Re-run `npm run db:seed` after editing — it's idempotent and only fills missing values.

agent.businessNotes: Describe your typical billing situation here — e.g. 'All sales are intra-EU services exempt of Spanish VAT under art. 25 Law 37/1992. Estimación directa simplificada.' This text is dropped into the Telegram agent's system prompt so it can give grounded answers.
